prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: hero poster. Story world: Red Creek Winter. Premise: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi.. Setting: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown. Threat presence: The White Knife. Recurring motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass. Create premium launch key art that introduces player mission stakes and iconic environmental cues with poster-level composition.. Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery. Tone: INTENSE. Immediate scene brief: Red Creek Winter Story Key Art. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. No title treatment, no UI overlay, no case notes panel, no labels, no watermark, no logo, no poster typography, no debug text. Compose a high-end key art image with a dominant focal threat, layered foreground and background storytelling, a strong silhouette, and clear thematic clues embedded in the environment. Keep it elegant, unsettling, and market-ready.
source_prompt: Story: Red Creek Winter (red-creek-winter) | Hook: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi. | Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown | Villain: The White Knife | Villain worldview: Fear is the only honest truth in a town built on denial. | Motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass. Create premium launch key art that introduces player mission stakes and iconic environmental cues with poster-level composition.
